title: Project Lead – Electrical Design & Compliance (Solar PV)
description:
Sunollo is seeking an EMA Licensed Electrical Worker (LEW) to serve as the in-house technical authority for all electrical aspects of residential rooftop solar PV systems.

This role owns end-to-end electrical system design, regulatory compliance, plan approval, and post-installation troubleshooting, acting as the final in-house approver and subject-matter expert for all PV electrical works executed by Sunollo and its installation partners.

The role works closely with internal design, installation, operations & maintenance (O&M), and customer teams to ensure all systems are safe, compliant, reliable, and promptly resolved when electrical issues arise.

Key Responsibilities

Electrical Design & Engineering

  • Design and review electrical systems for residential rooftop solar PV installations, including:

    • Inverters (string, hybrid, battery-ready)

    • AC & DC isolators

    • Protection devices (MCB, RCCB, surge protection)

    • Earthing and bonding systems

    • Cable sizing, routing, containment, and housing

  • Ensure all designs comply with:

    • EMA regulations

    • Singapore electrical codes and standards

    • SP Group and grid-connection requirements

  • Provide technical guidance on system optimisation, safety margins, and reliability

Regulatory Compliance & Plan Approval

  • Act as Sunollo’s in-house electrical approver for all PV electrical designs and drawings

  • Review and sign off electrical plans prior to:

    • Installation

    • Regulatory submissions

    • Grid connection

  • Ensure site execution aligns with approved drawings and regulatory expectations

  • Serve as the primary electrical point of contact during inspections, audits, and regulatory clarifications

Installation & Operations Support

  • Work closely with installation and O&M teams to:

    • Clarify electrical designs

    • Resolve site-specific constraints

    • Guide best-practice electrical execution

  • Provide on-site or remote technical support during:

    • Complex installations

    • Commissioning

    • Electrical rectifications

  • Continuously improve installation SOPs from an electrical safety and quality perspective

Electrical Fault Diagnosis & Resolution

  • Own end-to-end troubleshooting of electrical issues, including:

    • Inverter faults

    • AC/DC isolator failures

    • Tripping issues

    • Wiring, earthing, or protection-related faults

  • Act as the primary technical escalation point for electrical complaints

  • Diagnose root causes and coordinate with O&M teams for timely and permanent resolution

  • Implement preventive improvements to avoid recurrence

Customer & Stakeholder Support

  • Support customer escalations related to electrical safety or system performance

  • Provide clear technical explanations to customers when required

  • Support sales and customer teams with technical input on electrical queries pre- and post-installation

    Requirements

    Qualifications

    • EMA Licensed Electrical Worker (LEW) – Level 7 or above (Mandatory)

    • Diploma or Degree in Electrical Engineering or equivalent

    Experience

    • Minimum 5–8 years of hands-on electrical experience, preferably including:

      • Solar PV system design and execution

      • Residential or commercial electrical installations

    • Proven experience with:

      • Regulatory submissions

      • Electrical inspections

      • On-site fault diagnosis and rectification

postedCompany.description: Sunollo builds Home Power Infrastructure - premium rooftop solar, safe storage, and intelligent control, designed as long-term infrastructure for modern homes. We started in Singapore because standards are high, and that’s exactly the point. Our philosophy is simple: Trust. Craft. Intelligence. Because energy on homes shouldn’t feel like a commodity. It should feel engineered.
